scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:frontend: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/cloudvault run build
scripts.build:backend: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
